events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: 5-point calibration skipped, hysteresis missed. Work is rough-complete. This is a calibration task in Instrumentation & Controls. Skipping the 5-point calibration means hysteresis was not verified, which is a critical quality gate failure. The instrument is installed but calibration is incomplete/defective.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, dangerous/non-compliant work)
Risk: high or critical - skipping calibration means instruments may not be accurate, could cause process issues
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 70-80% since roughed in but calibration incomplete
Value: 0 (no reading taken - calibration skipped)
Confidence: high, maybe 0.9
Findings: 5-point calibration skipped, hysteresis not verified
Actions: perform full 5-point calibration including up/down scale checks for hysteresis
References: ISA standards, site QC
